case_title: SPECK CAB COMPANY VS. NEIL CROFTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CROFTON, NEIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CROFTON, NEIL $5,395.94 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,480.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,395.94 FILED BY SPECK CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CROFTON, NEIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-25-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CROFTON, NEIL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RACHID MOUHAYA AND BRUNO VIEIRA--MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
